sentence_reviews.text: Human-in-the-loop and sandbox controls bound agent authority through approvals, permissions, quotas, isolated execution, audit logs, and reversible actions.

General code-execution/sandbox concepts from the dependency label; packet lacks a dedicated sandbox/security reference.
sentence_reviews.notes: Approvals/permissions/sandboxes/audit logs are standard safety-control concepts, but no dedicated sandbox or HITL source is in the packet.
